hero.title: Wholesale Auto Parts. Built for Global Distributors.
hero.subtitle: VETHY is a Chinese auto parts manufacturer and exporter serving distributors, workshops and fleets in 60+ countries. OE-quality engine, brake, cooling, suspension, electrical and HVAC components — shipped FCL/LCL from Qingdao.

why.quality_desc: Automotive-grade quality management with ECE R90, DOT and E-mark approvals across regulated categories.
why.moq_desc: Mix SKUs in a 20'/40' container with our consolidation team. LCL groupage available for new buyers.
why.logistics_desc: Direct sailings to Los Angeles, Hamburg, Santos, Durban, Jebel Ali and 30+ global ports.
why.oem_desc: Custom packaging, brand printing and bespoke product engineering for established distributors.

rfq.title: Request a Wholesale Quote
rfq.subtitle: Send your SKU list, target market and target volume. Our export team replies within one business day.
rfq.name: Full name
rfq.thanks: Thank you. We will reply within one business day.

footer.tagline: VETHY — Wholesale auto parts manufacturer & exporter from Qingdao, China.
